name: Double-Chocolate Rum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 10-inch tube pan or a 12-cup bundt pan. Combine the cake mix, pudding mix, eggs, half of the rum, half of the water and oil in a large mixing bowl. Beat at low speed until ingredients are moistened. Then beat for two minutes at medium speed. Stir in the chocolate chips. Pour batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes. Remove from the pan and let cool on a wire rack.
2. In a small saucepan, heat preserves and the remaining half cup of rum until smooth. Strain through a sieve to remove seeds. Place the cake on a serving plate. Prick the surface with a fork or toothpick. Brush the raspberry glaze evenly over the cake. Apply all the glaze, taking care to spread it evenly.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining chocolate chips and shortening. Microwave for 1 minute until smooth. Drizzle the chocolate icing over the cake. Let stand for about 15 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, mix the vanilla baking bar and the remaining teaspoon of water. Microwave for 30 seconds (or until melted). Drizzle the vanilla icing over the chocolate icing. Serve with strong coffee.
